headline: Children's AI toy stored conversations on unsecured server, researchers find
summary: Security researchers disclosed a misconfigured cloud bucket exposing voice recordings from a popular AI plush toy. The manufacturer has since secured the data.

headline: Study: kids form "real" attachments to AI companion toys within two weeks
summary: A Cambridge research team published findings on emotional bonding patterns in 4–8 year olds using AI-powered companion toys.

headline: Why AI toys are arriving faster than the rules that govern them
summary: A look at the gap between the speed of generative AI in consumer toys and the slower pace of toy-safety regulation.

headline: Talking bear pulled from sale after jailbreak goes viral
summary: A widely-shared TikTok video showed an AI plush toy producing inappropriate content after a simple prompt. The retailer has paused sales pending investigation.
